response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and leadership in technical discovery sessions with enterprise stakeholders — critical for this staff-level GenAI role.
strengths: Experienced in AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling
Proven full-stack proficiency with TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud-native tooling (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes)
Demonstrated technical leadership through workshops, open-source projects, and mentoring
concerns: No explicit evidence of 8+ years in production AI systems; most roles are general software development
Missing clear experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM evaluation/optimization
Career gap since Oct 2025 and limited enterprise customer-facing technical leadership documented
